title: Saphyre MC
description: A lightweight vanilla-friendly modpack to make Minecraft feel a bit better.
body:
**Saphyre MC** is a vanilla-friendly modpack designed to make gameplay a little nicer for me and my friends, while remaining close to the original Minecraft experience.

**ATTENTION:** Some versions include [Nvidium](https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium), which is **still in BETA and may cause ISSUES.**

![Saphyre MC banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b8NErKVu/images/8a18c43f84bd8f6634bced8ec5df208e00f50a93.png)

<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

> Feel free to use it as a base for your own modpack, but please **give proper credit to everyone**.

</details>

<small>*Based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) by [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop) in past versions.*</small>
